title: BULLDOG BUBBLES - 211info
text: MARLA'S MALL BULLDOG BUBBLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry services through a work experience program for high school students. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Laundry: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-11:30am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: Monday-Wednesday 7:30am-11:30am and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 524-2309 Melody Webb Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment. General public is responsible for drop off and pick up. FEES: $7 to wash and dry a load of laundry DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Baker County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entry at the corner of 9th Street and G Street. Brick building in the parking lot between Baker High School and the football stadium. Services: Laundry Facilities Youth Community Service Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - MARLA'S MALL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARLA'S MALL
